race.comment: ELROND (3) has found the maiden win elusive so far but it certainly hasn't been without trying and a change of scenery could finally unlock him. Has trialled up nicely and keeps Holder. Can make a bright start for the new colours. FULLHEADOFSTEAM (4) gave a bold sight fresh off a long break before being reeled in late. Was too bad to be true second-up but can bounce back sharply third-up. 2kg claimer stays on. SUMMERTIME MADNESS (8) has been left with too much to do since resuming but has warmed into late. Will likely get back again from another wide draw but can cause a scare late if the pace is genuine. KARMA QUEEN (11) has struggled so far but gets the blinkers on first time which could improve her. Keeping safe for a minor spot.
